generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutputPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance OutputPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensors measuring input current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredIM : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) from current sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionModel
]

instance MeasuredRM : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor angular position (r_M)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionModel
]

instance MeasuredRout : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured output angular position (r_out)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionModel
]

instance DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor, MotorEncoder
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque (τ_M) from current and position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionModel
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from motor position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkFrictionModel
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural models (BDD and IBD for component interconnections)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTool
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation models for friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationTool
]

instance AASMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset metadata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset metadata"
    DTDFVocab:enables AASMetadataService
]

instance SysMLModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling (BDD and IBD)"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for controlling motor"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for friction data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlParametersAction
]

instance FrictionVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction data through a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDataVisualizationInsight
]

instance AASMetadataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Metadata management via Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides AASMetadataInsight
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling of components using SysML"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Control of motor via CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlInsight
]

instance AdjustControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of robot control parameters based on friction model identification to enhance motion accuracy during machining operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionDataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction data for monitoring"
]

instance AASMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset metadata management and traceability"
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Component interconnections and structural analysis"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data transmission monitoring"
]

instance ControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Motor control parameter monitoring"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor generating torque τ_M from current I_M"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel transforming rotational energy with torque τ_G"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox outputting torque τ_out"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DControllerActing : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DControllerActing, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming and processing with live measurements from physical system for immediate friction model updates during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral models, live sensor data streams via MQTT, processing components for friction calculation, and unified dashboard visualization for comprehensive monitoring of robot first axis behavior."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, focusing on real-time friction identification and motion control improvement during operational use of the robot."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of data generation through processing components and models, with combined white-box and black-box friction models validated against real-time measurements for accuracy improvement."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (current, position) from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for industrial asset description and SysML for model-based systems engineering."
]
